title: Deliciously Briny Northern Irish Lentil Cottage Pie
description: A hearty, briny, and springy vegan-friendly dish featuring hojicha and perfect for a post-workout meal, inspired by the flavors of Northern Ireland.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pot, combine the lentils, hojicha tea bags, and vegetable broth, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
While the lentils are cooking, heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat and saute the onion and carrots until they are tender.
Stir the cooked onion and carrots into the lentil mixture and season with salt and black pepper.
Transfer the lentil mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Spread the mashed potatoes over the top of the lentil mixture.
If using nutritional yeast, sprinkle it over the top of the potatoes.
Bake the cottage pie in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown.
